name: Prolific
description: Research participant and data-labeling marketplace used by AI labs for high-quality human feedback.

seo.title: Prolific — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Prolific: Research participant and data-labeling marketplace used by AI labs for high-quality human feedback.

when_to_use: Recruiting diverse participant panels for AI evaluation studies
Collecting human preference data for RLHF training pipelines
Running A/B studies on LLM output quality with real users
Gathering behavioral data for training or fine-tuning AI models

pros: Used by major AI labs for RLHF data
cons: Smaller pool than Amazon Mechanical Turk
Best for research, not production labeling
review.verdict: Gold standard for high-quality academic and RLHF data; overkill for bulk labeling where Scale or Toloka fit better.
review.best_for: AI labs and researchers needing high-quality human feedback
review.not_for: Teams needing cheap, high-volume labeling at scale

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
